prompt: A product manager says: document share links should record the channel/source they came from, and link analytics should show it. Do not modify code. Produce an impact analysis and implementation plan.

expected_files.reason: Defines link persistence; required to decide whether source/channel belongs on Link or related models.
Migration boundary for any persisted link-source field.
Link creation/list API entry; likely place where source would enter the system.
Link update/detail API; required to assess editing or returning the source field.
Viewer event ingestion path; required to know whether source is copied into views/analytics.
Views API route; relevant to analytics display and querying.
Link analytics UI table; likely place where source/channel would be displayed.
Main link settings sheet; likely place for editing or showing link-level source metadata.
Analytics datasource; useful if source/category is stored in Tinybird events.
Tinybird query/pipes integration; useful for derived analytics impact.

must_notice: The request is product-language; do not assume the exact field name already exists.
The answer must distinguish link creation/update, view ingestion, analytics querying, and analytics display.
If source is persisted on Link only, the model must still explain how view analytics can group or display it.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim Tinybird schema changes are required unless a relevant datasource or pipe is verified.
Do not claim a migration filename before inspecting the migrations directory.
Do not say tests are absent without searching.
scoring_notes: First Papermark screening task. Calibrate P1/P2 after first human-reviewed pilot.
